query: SELECT `key`, value FROM workflow_settings WHERE value LIKE '%hambry%' OR value LIKE '%Hambry%' ORDER BY `key`;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mfUemcUDe4dZgvy.root --database 5aXJgJ23doBv7KCYS3YtvX --execute SELECT `key`, value FROM workflow_settings WHERE value LIKE '%hambry%' OR value LIKE '%Hambry%' ORDER BY `key`;
